metadata.instruction: Set an alarm for 8.30 AM that repeats every Monday
metadata.context: I need an alarm to remind me to badge in to work.

l3.rationale: Win key opens the Start/window interface.

l4.rationale: The user opens the Clock app environment and uses keyboard navigation to move through the app’s sections until reaching and activating the Add an alarm control.

l5.rationale: Opens the app and navigates through menus to reach the alarm setup area.
